text.label: Title
text.help-text: Displayed as the page's H1 and used in nav/search listings.

text.label: Sort order
text.help-text: Zero-padded numeric string used for sibling sort order (e.g. 000300 sorts before 000500). Written by the git-publish/editor proxy; only edit by hand if you know the padding width (6 digits) used elsewhere in the docs platform.

text.label: Tags
text.help-text: One tag per field. Used to build the tag index and the Cmd+K search facets.

text.label: Body
text.help-text: Canonical HTML body. Both write paths (git markdown->HTML and the BlockNote web editor) normalize to the same allowed-HTML subset before writing here — see implementation-plan.md 'Body format: BlockNote HTML round-trip risks'.
